local_regression_gates.fast_graph_io_structure: PASS: original edges, edge_id, bidirectional adjacency order, connected-component cache, self-loop degree semantics, zero/decimal/scientific weights, and rejection of trailing/bad tokens
local_regression_gates.query_io_validation: PASS: valid multi-query input plus rejection of negative query/group counts, empty groups, truncated payloads, and trailing tokens
local_regression_gates.zero_weight_witness: PASS: base, directed-cut-only and enhanced all return 1
local_regression_gates.configuration_exactness: PASS: all three legal configurations match independent exact subset DP on 144 deterministic random connected instances with g=2..10; the same gate validates the add-or-replace ConfigurationProfile, rejects unknown enhancement bits, and checks exact one-realization coverage of every required anchored layer for group counts 0..16; cumulative discovered-state totals are base=2772, directed-cut-only=972, enhanced=980
local_regression_gates.mask_vertex_state_accounting: PASS: ABHSS Base/Enhanced counts are deterministic across repeated runs, PrunedDP++ Hash/Dense report the same present-entry count, and trivial queries report zero
local_regression_gates.query_prelude_contracts: PASS: empty, singleton, overlapping-zero, disconnected-infeasible, out-of-range vertex and g>16 cases have the declared behavior
local_regression_gates.strict_bound_closure: PASS: a 5e-10 positive upper/lower gap is not misclassified as exact closure
local_regression_gates.illegal_configuration_bits: PASS: public API rejects unknown enhancement bits and adjoint-completion without directed-cut; the command line also rejects adjoint-only

repository_consistency_audit.github_markdown: PASS: all 15 tracked Markdown files are strict UTF-8, have balanced code/math fences and inline-dollar delimiters, contain no legacy LaTeX delimiters or raw math pipes inside tables, and have no broken local links
repository_consistency_audit.machine_matrix: PASS: validate_environment.py --require-performance-binaries expanded 143 cases and exactly 26,484 performance tasks (P1=8,318, P2=360, S2=150 queries across three methods)
repository_consistency_audit.machine_formats: PASS: all tracked JSON parses, Python tools compile, git diff whitespace check passes, and no tracked file exceeds 1 MiB
repository_consistency_audit.paper_method_contract: PASS: the active documents describe the same add-or-replace ConfigurationProfile, recurrence-derived A/H schedule, output fields, timeout, workload counts and source limitations as the code and machine manifests

configuration_inclusion_clarification_ga.status: SUPERSEDED for the current A1 schedule; retained as a historical naming-only gate
configuration_inclusion_clarification_ga.contract: safe additions or same-role replacements; every realized A1 row is materialized at most once and high-layer A1 may be replaced by H

structural_a1_schedule_gate.contract: the anchored recurrence defines the positive layer interval 1..q with q=max(0,floor(g/2)-1); Base, DirectedCutOnly and Enhanced cover that same interval with the declared forward-A or adjoint-H realization, and no empirical group-count threshold selects a path
structural_a1_schedule_gate.steinlib_final_build: Current audit rebuild: Base 11/11 in 13.207488 solver seconds and Enhanced 11/11 in 3.978831 solver seconds match known optima for g=11..16

results.basic_plus_upstream: 6 solved and matched; 1 eligible instance timed out in the 60-second validation run; g>14 unsupported upstream

artifact_checks.result: all weights match ABHSS base, ABHSS enhanced, and pruneddp_safe

decision: use pruneddp_safe as the primary exact performance baseline; retain pruneddp_strict only as a named paper-pathmax reproduction audit
